title: Farcr's Re-Crafted Enderite Addon
description: Adds support for enderite mod by nic4las/pitti11 to farcr's re-crafted resource pack
body:
Adds support for farcrs recrafted resource pack to enderite addon pack just place this pack over farcrs recrafted and it will work 
Originally made for an upcoming pack im making i will link it when its out
Feel free to use this in any modpack you like!
